name: The Church of Numerals II
intro: Now that we can build loops, let's explore more numerical functions.
Note that some of them can also be built using the built-in recursion of the Church numerals.

content.name: His Majesty Factorial
intro: Make a term that takes a number n and returns a product of all numbers from 1 to n.
Note that you can also use the built in recursion of the Church numerals for this quest.

content.name: Down the rabbit hole
intro: Create a term that takes a number n and returns the nth Fibonacci number.
Note that it might be easier to build n-th pair of Fibonacci numbers first.

content.name: Something in common
intro: Create a term that takes two numbers and returns their greatest common divisor (GCD).
gcd(0, n) = n, gcd(m, n) = gcd(n-m, m) (where m < n).
